summary: Comprehensive regression testing for refactored fabric_router.py, article_router.py, fabric_utils.py extraction from server.py. All 37 backend tests passed. Fixed HeroSearchCard bug (was passing category name instead of ID). Frontend tests verified HeroSearchCard, Admin Denim form, and fabric detail page.

fixed.issue: Was passing category NAME (e.g., 'Cotton Fabrics') instead of category ID (e.g., 'cat-cotton') to /fabrics page, causing 0 results
fixed.fix: Changed search() function to look up category ID from name before setting URL param

passed_tests: GET /api/fabrics - default listing returns fabrics with all required fields
GET /api/fabrics/count matches listing length for same filters
GET /api/fabrics/filter-options - returns colors, patterns, widths, compositions, has_denim
GET /api/fabrics/{slug} - lookup by SEO slug works
GET /api/fabrics/{id}/other-sellers - returns [] for fabrics without article_id
POST /api/fabrics - requires admin auth (401/403 without token)
POST/PUT/DELETE /api/fabrics - full CRUD cycle works with admin auth
POST /api/fabrics/reassign-seller - works with valid fabric_ids and seller_id
GET /api/articles - returns list with seller_name enrichment
GET /api/articles/{id} - returns article detail with seller_name
POST/PUT/DELETE /api/articles - full CRUD cycle works with admin auth
GET /api/enquiries - returns list with admin auth
PUT /api/enquiries/{id}/status - updates status with admin auth
GET /api/categories - returns categories with live fabric_count via $group
GET /api/collections/{id}/fabrics - returns normalized fabrics with seller enrichment
POST /api/migrate/blended - dry run returns status=noop (Blended category deleted)
Booking priority sort - bookable fabrics appear before enquiry-only
frontend_tests_passed: HeroSearchCard shows 7 category pills with live counts (Cotton=155, Polyester=16, Denim=13, etc.)
Categories with <20 SKUs show COMING SOON badge
HeroSearchCard Search button navigates to /fabrics with correct query string (category ID)
/fabrics page loads and shows fabric cards with seller name, MOQ, price, dispatch info
/fabrics/{slug} detail page loads correctly with SEO slug URL
Fabric detail page shows color variants and delivery timeline
Denim category selection shows Weave Type dropdown with 7 options
Denim category shows 8 denim-specific color options
Auto-generate button produces correct name format: 'Cotton Polyester Lycra, 3/1 RHT, 10oz, Color: Indigo x White'
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring is complete - fabric_router.py (659 lines), article_router.py (225 lines), fabric_utils.py (148 lines) extracted from server.py
All routers properly initialized with set_db() pattern
Booking priority sort preserved in fabric_router.py aggregation pipeline
Ounce range filter uses $regexFind + $convert pipeline stages correctly
Slug lookup with fallback to ID prefix works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Large refactor complete (~1300 LOC moved from server.py to fabric_router.py, article_router.py, fabric_utils.py). All fabric/article/enquiry/collection/category endpoints tested and working. Fixed HeroSearchCard bug where category name was passed instead of ID. Admin Denim form with weave/color dropdowns and auto-generate name working correctly.
